info.title: DeepClean - Recursively delete bin and obj folders
info.description:
Recursively finds and deletes all 'bin' and 'obj' folders from the
current directory downwards. Useful for cleaning up .NET projects.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show what would be deleted without actually deleting

options.name: --yes
options.description: Skip confirmation prompt and delete automatically
